title: kill: print ID and state for non-running containers
body:
Extend kill's error message to include the container's ID and state.
This address cases where error messages caused by other containers
may confuse users.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

There's no open issue for that. I just hit that case and wanted to improve the potentially confusing error message a bit.
